info.name: veg-store API (exhaustive)
info.description: Exhaustive Postman collection for the veg-store API. Run the folders in order (00 -> 12). Requires a one-time `npm run seed:postman` to create the admin user and the sample product image. See `poostman/README.md` for setup.

item.name: 00 Health
item.description: Smoke check that the API is reachable.

item.name: 01 Admin login
item.description: Log in the seeded admin user (created by `npm run seed:postman`). Stores `adminToken` for later admin-only requests.

item.name: 02 Customer auth
item.description: Register a fresh customer, exercise the auth/me endpoint, and verify role checks against admin routes.

exec: pm.test("message mentions invalid credentials", () => pm.expect(body.message).to.match(/invalid email or password/i));

item.name: 03 Categories
item.description: Admin CRUD on categories plus public listing, freeze visibility, soft delete, and role/validation checks.

item.name: 04 Products
item.description: Admin product CRUD via multipart/form-data, plus public visibility rules and validation negatives.

exec: throw new Error("sampleImagePath env variable is empty. Run `npm run seed:postman` and copy the printed path into the Postman environment.");
// `image` field is sent inline as a tiny text part to trigger the multer mime filter.
// Postman doesn't allow scripted file content from form-data; we keep a regular `text` field
// here named `image`. The API will then 400 because no file is attached on the multipart parser.
// The mime-rejection path is also covered by the Jest suite (handleUploadErrors).

item.name: 05 Cart
item.description: Cart add/update/remove/clear plus frozen-product, out-of-stock, and validation negatives.

item.name: 06 Orders - credit_card
item.description: Customer order creation with credit_card. Asserts pricing math (subtotal + delivery fee 15 for zone_a) and ownership rules.

item.name: 07 Orders - bit
item.description: Bit payment method also goes to pending_payment until the webhook updates it.

item.name: 08 Orders - bank_transfer + admin approval
item.description: Bank transfer orders start at bank_transfer_pending and can only be advanced by an admin via the payment-status endpoint.

item.name: 09 Payment webhooks
item.description: Exhaustive webhook coverage: bad/missing secret, success/failed/cancelled, idempotent replay, terminal-state rejection, bank-transfer rejection, missing order, validation errors.

item.name: 10 Order status transition flow
item.description: Walks the full new->confirmed->preparing->ready_for_delivery->sent_with_delivery_company->delivered path, plus invalid-transition and cancellation rules.

item.name: 11 Cross-customer ownership
item.description: Customer B should not be able to view Customer A's orders even with a valid token.

item.name: 12 Misc security
item.description: Final negative tests: malformed JSON body, malformed Authorization header.
